untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern width classification (Narrow vs Wide) and pattern height classification (Short vs Tall) which are visual/structural pattern properties not available in allowed indicators. The statistics table shows outcome-dependent performance but lacks mechanistic entry rules. Pattern formation length (52-65 days median) cannot be measured without a custom pattern detection indicator. Breakout direction classification requires pattern structure analysis beyond price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels as proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the core Bulkowski pattern analysis logic which depends on: (1) Pattern width/height morphology classification, (2) Specific formation structure identification, (3) Market regime context matching. The provided statistics are performance outcomes for pattern variants, not entry/exit conditions. A proper implementation requires a custom pattern recognition module or higher-level structural indicators not in the allowed set.
